name: claude-setup
description: Claude Code setup utilities. Three [3] capabilities: (1) installs Sam's multi-line PowerShell statusline (model, session/project cost, context fill bar, 5-hour and weekly usage bars, burn rate, work duration and diff stats) into ~/.claude/ and wires up settings.json — Classic single-script variant or Extended widget platform with built-in rate_limits, Braille sparklines, adaptive mode-aware layout, OSC 8 hyperlinks and skill-aware overlays for the SumProduct stack; (2) an interactive customizer that walks users through palette / width / line-toggle choices with live in-terminal previews before applying; (3) sets up the Google Gemini API on Windows — persists GEMINI_API_KEY to the User scope, validates via small text + image calls against the v1 stable endpoint (avoiding the v1beta image-gen free-tier limit), and bundles a troubleshooter that decodes 401 / 403 / 429 errors with tailored remediation. Windows-only.
